description: Compact LilyGo Screen-4.7-S3 flush enclosure body for a screen-to-PCB bonded stack, with the former rear cover fused into the main body and the four internal PCB screw bosses removed.

key_dimensions.battery_pocket_clear_span: x -26.3..26.3, y -41.8..41.8; centered with the four internal screw bosses removed
key_dimensions.battery_retainer: 1.4 mm thick x 1.8 mm high rails on the inside of battery_door.step
key_dimensions.battery_door_design: centered sliding removable rear battery door with two upper insertion tongues, enlarged receiver pockets, a lower low-profile snap tooth, longer flex relief slots, and a fingernail notch
key_dimensions.battery_door_panel: 59.9 x 90.9 x 1.0, exported separately as battery_door.step
key_dimensions.battery_door_latching: insert upper tongues first, then press the lower edge; the lower snap is reduced to 0.55 mm high with 0.65 mm receiver clearance so it can catch more easily
key_dimensions.rear_vent_design: perimeter rear-cover vents removed because the centered battery-door side bands are too narrow; vents now sit on the removable battery door
key_dimensions.button_insert: separate three-button carrier exported as buttons.step; retained by two main-body heat-stake posts through matching holes
key_dimensions.button_heat_stake_mounting: two 1.6 mm diameter posts grow from the inner side wall at the solid webs between the three button openings; the button strip has 1.95 mm clearance holes and is fixed by heat-melting the post tips after installation
key_dimensions.pcb_retention: four internal PCB screw bosses and bottom screw pockets removed; bonded screen/PCB stack is seated by the flush front fit and adhesive

changes_from_v14: Removed all screen snap latches and discrete support pads.
Kept the top as a flush side-wall opening so the bonded screen face can sit level with the shell edge.
Removed the rear cover PCB mounts and bottom screw head pockets.
Retained the compact 123 x 69 mm footprint and constrained side connector windows.
changes_from_verified_h716_hole_update: Replaced the previous symmetric PCB mount pattern with the verified H716 V2.4 mounting coordinates.
Converted PCB top-left coordinates into the centered CadQuery enclosure coordinate system.
changes_from_corner_and_battery_update: Reduced the screen/opening corner radius to 1.2 mm and the outer enclosure radius to 1.5 mm to match the very small real board corner radius.
Moved the battery retaining pocket center from y=18.0 mm to y=5.0 mm; later revisions removed the fixed screw/boss positions entirely.
changes_from_h716_side_io_update: Repositioned the three side-button openings, SD-card opening, and Type-C opening using the H716 V2.4 enclosure model as reference.
Removed the previous extra JST side opening.
Added a separate three-button insert with three proud caps, short stems, and an internal carrier strip.
changes_from_h716_side_io_verification: Moved Type-C from the short +Y end to the same +X long side as the buttons.
Moved the SD-card opening to the +X long side before the three-button cluster.
Verified the long-side order as SD, three buttons, then Type-C.
changes_from_h716_frm_direct_cutout_upda: Replaced semantic SD/Type-C/Button guesses with cutout boxes transferred directly from h716_032n_frm.stl.
Added one long-side slot and three bottom-open button notches on the -X side.
Added one wide opening and one small notch on the -Y end side.
changes_from_rear_vent_update: Added five rounded vertical through-slots on the left rear-cover area outside the battery pocket.
Added four short rounded horizontal through-slots near the upper and lower rear-cover edges for extra airflow.
Kept all rear ventilation slots clear of the battery retaining rails and former PCB screw boss positions.
changes_from_centered_openable_battery_u: Moved the battery pocket center to the enclosure center at x=0.0, y=0.0.
Changed the rear cover into a centered openable battery bay with an outside shallow recess and a through opening.
Added a separate removable battery_door part with a locating plug, small latch ribs, fingernail notch, and battery retaining rails on its inside face.
Moved the rear ventilation slots to the perimeter around the battery door.
changes_from_vent_position_correction: Removed the narrow left/right perimeter vents that were squeezed beside the centered battery door.
Moved the ventilation pattern onto the removable battery door as a centered 3 x 5 rounded slot grille.
Kept the grille clear of the fingernail notch, latch ribs, and battery retaining rails.
changes_from_sliding_battery_door_update: Replaced the previous friction-style battery door with a sliding snap design.
Added two upper insertion tongues on the battery door and matching receiver pockets in the rear cover.
Added a lower snap tooth, a matching receiver pocket, and two flex relief slots so the fingernail notch can release the latch.
changes_from_heat_staked_button_update: Changed the side button strip from a glue-retained insert to a heat-staked insert.
Added two horizontal heat-stake posts to the main body inner side wall.
Added two matching clearance holes through the button carrier strip and slightly thickened the carrier for better heat-stake support.
changes_from_button_rear_cover_clearance: Raised the internal button carrier and heat-stake posts by 0.75 mm so the button strip clears the rear-cover lip.
Verified rear_cover/button_bar and rear_cover/main_body intersections are zero after the adjustment.
changes_from_button_heat_stake_position_: Moved the two heat-stake posts from the button-strip end areas into the solid webs between the three button openings.
New heat-stake y positions are 14.27 mm and 22.92 mm, centered between button_1/button_2 and button_2/button_3 cutouts.
Kept rear_cover/button_bar and rear_cover/main_body intersections at zero after the adjustment.
changes_from_button_motion_clearance_upd: Added local motion-clearance pockets behind the three side button openings so button stems no longer intersect the main body.
Verified main_body/button_bar, rear_cover/button_bar, and rear_cover/main_body intersection volumes are all zero.
changes_from_fused_rear_cover_update: Fused the former rear_cover geometry into main_body.step as one enclosure_body solid.
Removed rear_cover.step as a separate exported part.
Regenerated only STEP outputs in the project folder; no STL, FCStd, macro, or preview outputs are generated.
changes_from_side_opening_layout_update: Kept the -X long side as SD_slot/long_side_slot followed by button_1, button_2, and button_3.
Moved the end opening to the +Y short side.
Removed small_end_notch from the generated enclosure.
changes_from_sd_slot_width_update: Superseded by the source STL cutout update; the -X long-side slot now matches the downloaded h716_032n_frm.stl boundary instead of the temporary widened estimate.
changes_from_source_stl_cutout_update: Replaced scaled/guessed side openings with direct boundary boxes extracted from /home/midea/Downloads/h716_032n_frm.stl.
Initially mapped the -X bottom-open long notch at source y -9.75..4.75 and z -2.55..8.05; this was later corrected because it is not the SD slot.
Set the -X button openings to source y ranges 8.05..13.15, 16.55..21.65, 26.05..31.15 and z 1.516..8.05.
Set the +Y short-side wide opening to source x -15.30..-0.70 and z 1.25..10.05.
Removed H716 opening coordinate scaling so source widths, heights, and positions are preserved in the current model coordinates.
changes_from_sd_slot_source_correction: Corrected the -X SD slot to the source STL upper narrow slot instead of replacing the full long-side opening set.
Set SD slot source bounds to y -32.333..-16.933 and z 9.05..10.05, preserving the 15.40 x 1.00 mm source opening size.
Superseded by the complete source X-face restore because the source STL also includes the bottom-open long notch and the right upper narrow slot.
changes_from_complete_source_x_face_rest: Superseded by final_x_side_slot_cleanup; this intermediate revision restored more -X source openings than the final requested generated model keeps.
Kept here only as history for the extraction/debugging sequence.
changes_from_sd_slot_semantic_fix: Renamed the button-left source opening from bottom_open_long_notch to sd_slot.
Kept sd_slot at the wide source bounds y -9.75..4.75 and z -2.55..8.05, size 14.50 x 10.60 mm.
Kept the two upper 15.40 x 1.00 mm narrow slots separate so they are not treated as the SD opening.
changes_from_source_z_alignment_fix: Changed H716 source z mapping so the source STL side-face bottom maps to current model z=0 instead of z=rear_cover_thickness.
Moved sd_slot from model z 1.80..12.40 to z 0.00..10.60 while preserving its 14.50 x 10.60 mm source size.
Regenerated comparison screenshots in /tmp/h716_xface_boundary_compare_after.png and /tmp/h716_3d_compare_after.png before final verification.
changes_from_final_x_side_slot_cleanup: Removed the upper narrow slots at y -32.333..-16.933 and y 32.667..48.067 from the generated -X side.
Kept only the requested -X side openings: sd_slot at y -9.75..4.75 and button_1 through button_3.
Re-cut side and end openings after fusing rear_cover into main_body so the sd_slot is not blocked by the rear cover bottom plate.
changes_from_side_cutter_axis_fix: Fixed the side/end opening cutters to use global XYZ box dimensions instead of YZ/XZ workplane-local dimensions.
This restores sd_slot width along model Y to 14.50 mm instead of assigning that dimension to the wrong axis.
changes_from_printability_tuning: Increased the compact outer delta from 3.0 mm to 3.8 mm, raising the side wall from about 1.18 mm to about 1.58 mm.
Increased rear cover thickness from 1.8 mm to 2.1 mm and battery door panel thickness from 0.7 mm to 1.0 mm.
Strengthened the sliding battery door latch details: tab height 1.0 mm, snap height 0.9 mm, and flex relief slots widened to 1.4 mm.
Strengthened the heat-staked button insert: carrier 1.8 x 2.0 mm, heat-stake posts 1.6 mm, clearance holes 1.95 mm, and deeper button stems so the button strip exports as one connected solid.
changes_from_m3_mount_update: Raised the four internal cylindrical PCB screw bosses by 3.0 mm.
Changed the screw clearance holes from 2.4 mm to 3.2 mm for M3 screws.
Changed the bottom screw head pockets from 4.6 x 1.0 mm to 6.0 x 2.0 mm and increased boss diameter from 5.8 mm to 7.0 mm.
changes_from_battery_door_fit_update: Updated the battery size assumption from 81 x 50 x 4 mm to 82 x 51 x 4 mm.
Expanded the battery pocket, rear door opening, recess, and battery door panel by 1.0 mm in both width and length.
Raised the battery retaining rails from 1.0 mm to 1.8 mm and thickened them from 1.0 mm to 1.4 mm.

Made the lower battery-door snap easier to engage by reducing snap height from 0.9 mm to 0.55 mm, reducing snap overlap from 1.2 mm to 0.8 mm, and increasing receiver clearance from 0.35 mm to 0.65 mm.
Lengthened and widened the battery-door flex relief slots to make the lower latch tongue more flexible.
changes_from_mount_boss_removal: Removed the four internal cylindrical PCB screw bosses from the fused main body.
Removed the matching 3.2 mm bottom screw clearance holes and 6.0 mm screw head pockets.
Regenerated main_body.step, buttons.step, battery_door.step, and shape.step.

validation.tool: CadQuery STEP export plus per-part STEP import/topology check

assembly_note: Screen and PCB are assumed to be bonded first with thin 3M double-sided tape; the bonded stack seats into the flush front opening without the four internal screw bosses. Measure real stack height before printing if exact flushness is critical.
preview_note: No preview/STL regeneration is performed for this revision; the project folder keeps STEP outputs only.
